title: Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (MDRRMC) Resolution No. 19-07, dated July 8,2019, entitled ? Resolution approving the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management fund of the Municipality of Los Baños amounting to Seventeen Million One Hundred Thirty-Six Thousand Three Hundred Sixty-Five Pesos and 50/100 (17,136,365.50) for CY 2020.
